commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

evaluation.critique: The component demonstrates strong adherence to design tokens and proper data handling from props, with good use of semantic color variables and spacing tokens. However, the component code appears truncated (WeatherStats.tsx cuts off mid-comment), and some interactive polish elements like hover states and transitions are not visible in the provided snippet, preventing full evaluation of visual feedback mechanisms.
